data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — AC1: bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 ✓ (pre-existing RED failures are unrelated). AC2: grep -q FAIL returns match ✓ — test_review_tier_valid_value_passes is FAIL/RED against current schema (review_tier rejected as unexpected key). Two new tests added to tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh: (1) test_review_tier_valid_value_passes — RED, expects exit 0 for review_tier=standard; (2) test_review_tier_invalid_value_fails — PASS (fails for wrong reason now, enum check TBD). No discovered bugs outside scope.
